testimonials.name: Sarah J.
testimonials.text: My daughter was absolutely thrilled to see herself as a character in a story! The quality of the book exceeded my expectations. Will definitely order again for birthdays.

testimonials.name: Michael T.
testimonials.text: My son carries his personalized book everywhere now. It's become his favorite bedtime story. The illustrations are fantastic and the story is engaging.

testimonials.name: Emma K.
testimonials.text: Ordered a book for my nephew's birthday and was blown away by it. The process was so easy and the final product is amazing. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: What a wonderful gift! My 4-year-old was so excited to see herself as the main character. The personalization is incredible and the story kept her engaged from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Lisa M.
testimonials.text: Perfect for bedtime reading! My twins each have their own personalized book and they love comparing their adventures. Great quality and fast delivery too.

testimonials.name: Jennifer W.
testimonials.text: Bought this for my grandson's 3rd birthday and it was the hit of the party! He keeps asking us to read 'his book' over and over. Worth every penny!

questions.question: How does the personalization process work?
questions.answer: Simply upload a photo of your child, enter their name and details, then choose from our selection of stories. Our AI will create a personalized illustration of your child that matches the art style of the book. You'll be able to preview the cover before ordering.

questions.question: How long does it take to receive my book?
questions.answer: Once you approve the preview and complete your order, books are typically printed within 2-3 business days and shipped via standard mail (5-7 days) or express shipping (2-3 days).

questions.question: Can I edit the book after it's been created?
questions.answer: You can make edits to your personalization details (name, age, etc.) before finalizing your purchase. After the book has been sent to print, no further changes can be made.

questions.question: What age range are these books suitable for?
questions.answer: Our books are designed for children aged 2-8 years old, with engaging stories and beautiful illustrations that capture young imaginations.

questions.question: Can I create books for multiple children?
questions.answer: Yes! You can create unique personalized books for each child in your family. Each book is individually customized with the child's name, photo, and chosen story.

faqPage.pageDescription: Frequently asked questions about the personalized book creation process, payment, and shipping.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions

questions.question: How does the personalization process work?
questions.answer: Simply upload a photo of your child, enter their name and details, then choose from our selection of stories. Our AI will create a personalized illustration of your child that matches the art style of the book. You'll be able to preview the cover before ordering.

questions.question: How long does it take to receive my book?
questions.answer: Once you approve the preview and complete your order, books are typically printed within 2-3 business days and shipped via standard mail (5-7 days) or express shipping (2-3 days).

questions.question: Can I edit the book after it's been created?
questions.answer: You can make edits to your personalization details (name, age, etc.) before finalizing your purchase. After the book has been sent to print, no further changes can be made.

questions.question: What age range are these books suitable for?
questions.answer: Our books are designed for children aged 2-8 years old, with engaging stories and beautiful illustrations that capture young imaginations.

questions.question: Can I create books for multiple children?
questions.answer: Yes! You can create unique personalized books for each child in your family. Each book is individually customized with the child's name, photo, and chosen story.

questions.question: What is the quality of the printed books?
questions.answer: Our books are printed on high-quality paper with durable binding, designed to withstand enthusiastic reading by young children. We offer both softcover and hardcover options.

questions.question: Do you ship internationally?
questions.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by location. You'll see the exact shipping costs during checkout.

questions.question: How secure is my child's photo and data?
questions.answer: We take privacy seriously. All photos and personal information are encrypted and used solely for creating your personalized book. We never share your data with third parties, and photos are deleted from our servers after production.

questions.question: Can I order additional copies of a book I've already created?
questions.answer: Yes! You can order additional copies of any book you've created by visiting your dashboard and selecting 'Reorder' on the book you want more copies of.

questions.question: What if I'm not satisfied with my book?
questions.answer: We have a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with your book for any reason, please contact our customer support team within 30 days of receipt, and we'll work to make it right.

faqPage.contactHelp: We're here to help! Contact our customer support team.
faqPage.supportHours: Our team is available Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm EST

errors.multiFace:

errors.noFace:
No face detected.
Please make sure your child's face is clearly visible and facing the camera.
errors.profileFace: We need a photo where your child is facing the camera.
errors.faceCovered:
We can't see the full face.
Try another photo.
errors.tooDark:
Lighting is too dark.
Take a clearer photo.
errors.tooBright:
Lighting is too bright.
Take a clearer photo.

Try a sharper image.

errors.inappropriate:
That picture isn't suitable.

errors.fileSize:
Image file is too large.

errors.fileType:

JPEG or PNG only.
errors.resolution:
Image resolution too low.
Please upload higher quality photo.
errors.faceTooSmall: Please get closer – the face should fill about half the image
errors.faceTooLarge: Please step back – the face should fill about half the image
errors.eyesClosed: Please make sure the eyes are open and looking at the camera
errors.notForwardFacing: Please look directly at the camera (not in profile)
errors.glasses: Please upload a photo without sunglasses
errors.illustrated: We only accept real photos, not illustrations
errors.generic: Photo validation failed. Please try another image.
